channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senate passes $70B immigration enforcement bill without limits on Trump settlement fund
item.description: The Senate passed legislation early Friday to fund President Donald Trump's immigration enforcement agencies, after weeks of delays and fierce debate.

item.title: Senate Republicans pass immigration funding after overnight vote
item.description: After a marathon 18-hour vote, the Senate has funded immigration enforcement. The GOP bill funds ICE and the Border Patrol for three years.

item.title: This week's quiz tracks Trump's wins and losses. Can you win bigly?
item.description: Plus, Serena Williams, Peabo Bryson, Kalshi and United Airlines appear. Have you been paying attention?

item.title: For many fans, the World Cup begins with a pack of stickers. The U.S. is catching up
item.description: Collecting Panini stickers is a beloved World Cup tradition in Europe and Latin America. In the U.S., interest has steadily grown, and this su...
